title: Ingredient
description: Ingredient canonical v1 contract for materials used by formula, recipe, BOM, MRP, QC, trace, and source-origin control.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 Ingredient Canonical and PACK-03 material grouping catalog. TODO: complete material master attributes and UOM catalog are not finalized in the source documents.

material_group.description: Material group from PACK-03: A1/A2/A3 ingredients and B1/B2/B3 packaging/materials.

source_origin_id.description: Linked source-origin record when source traceability is required.

is_anchor_ingredient.description: True when this ingredient is the rice anchor for formula scaling.

default_buffer_rate.description: Planning buffer rate, e.g. 5% for Group A or 7% for B1/B2. Stored as string to avoid precision loss.

qc_required.description: Whether lot-level QC is required before production readiness.
